figures.caption: Figure 1: Single-run output. Left panel: bootstrap distribution of ψ̂bEB with a rug of the J individual estimators and vertical lines at ψ̂EB and the true ψ. Right panel: bootstrap distribution of log(τ̂2b + 1) (trimmed at the 1st and 99th percentiles) with log(τ̂2 + 1) and the line τ2 = 0. Setup: q = 7, J = 121, nrct = 50, nobs = 1000, B = 500, and nominal coverage 90%.
